verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ لَآ أُقْسِمُ بِهَٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ
verses.text: I swear by this land
– and you are a lawful (resident) in this land –
by a begetter and what he begot!
Certainly We created the human in trouble.

verses.quran_arabic: أَيَحْسَبُ أَن لَّن يَقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ أَحَدٌۭ
verses.text: Does he think that no one has power over him?
He says, ‘I have squandered vast wealth!’
Does he think that no one has seen him?
Have We not made two eyes for him,
and a tongue, and two lips?
And have We not guided him to the two ways?
Yet he has not attempted the (steep) ascent.
And what will make you know what the (steep) ascent is?
The setting free of a slave,

verses.quran_arabic: أَوْ إِطْعَٰمٌۭ فِى يَوْمٍۢ ذِى مَسْغَبَةٍۢ
verses.text: or feeding on a day of hunger
an orphan who is related,
or a poor person (lying) in the dust.

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْمَرْحَمَةِ
verses.text: Then he has become one of those who believe, and (who) exhort (each other) to patience, and (who) exhort (each other) to mercy.
Those are the companions on the right.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا هُمْ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْمَشْـَٔمَةِ
verses.text: But those who disbelieve in Our signs, they are the companions on the left.
A fire (will be) closed over them.
